name: Moses
clue: Led the Exodus and received the Ten Commandments.

name: Ruth
clue: Loyal daughter-in-law who appears in a short book bearing her name.

name: David
clue: Shepherd boy who became king and wrote many psalms.

name: Esther
clue: Became queen and saved her people in Persia.

name: Paul
clue: Apostle to the Gentiles who wrote many New Testament letters.
